key.name: active-profile
key.description: The ID of the currently active profile, or empty string if none.

key.name: startup-mode
key.description: What to do on login: none, last, or default.

key.name: default-profile
key.description: Profile to apply on startup if mode is default.

key.name: always-enabled
key.description: List of extension UUIDs that should never be disabled.

key.name: indicator-style
key.description: 0: Icon only, 1: Icon + Text, 2: Text only, 3: Hidden
